description_long: This object is a classic record player with a rectangular wooden base featuring a rich, dark wood grain texture. The top surface houses a large, circular black turntable platter, centrally positioned and slightly raised above the wood. A slender, metallic tonearm with a black head is mounted to one side, extending over the platter and resting in a cradle. A small, rectangular control block, likely for power or speed adjustment, is situated in one corner of the top surface. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible branding or decorative elements, emphasizing function and retro style. The materials and finish suggest a sturdy, vintage-inspired appliance suitable for home or urban lounge environments.
description: A vintage-style record player with a dark wood base, black turntable platter, and metallic tonearm, featuring a minimalist and functional design.
description_view_0: The record player is seen from the front left, highlighting the circular black platter, the metallic tonearm resting at the back, and the rectangular control block on the left.
description_view_1: From the front, the platter is centered, the tonearm is visible on the right, and the control block is clearly seen on the left side.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the tonearm's mounting and cradle, with the platter and control block both visible but less prominent.
description_view_3: From the back left, the tonearm is seen extending away from the viewer, with the platter and control block both visible but partially obscured.
attribute_turntable_platter: The turntable platter is present, large, and circular, occupying the central area of the record player. It is black with a smooth, slightly glossy finish and appears to be made of plastic or metal. The platter is raised above the wooden base and has a subtle edge, but no visible grooves or markings are apparent.
attribute_tonearm: The tonearm is present, slender, and metallic with a black head. It is mounted on the right side of the player, extending over the platter and resting in a cradle. The tonearm appears to be made of metal with a smooth, reflective finish and is of medium length, with visible joints at the base.
attribute_control_knobs: A single rectangular control block is visible on the top left of the player. It is gray, slightly raised, and appears to be made of plastic, but no individual knobs, switches, or labels are visible.
